Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 54 

MDCD_OPTNL_CVRG_ADLT_POP_IND 

LABEL: Eligible Population Indicator: Medicaid Optional Coverage Adult-Children — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates if the managed care entity is authorized to enroll the family/adult eligibility groups; ever in 
the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: MDCD_OPTNL_CVRG_ADLT_POP_IND 

LONG NAME: MDCD_OPTNL_CVRG_ADLT_POP_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1
